英國英格蘭賀福爾波斯波利
zh.Bosbury,Hereford,England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾波斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Watkins II於1600年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾波斯波利時，他的父親Richard Watkins30歲，母親Martha Peede33歲。他和Blanche至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1654年11月25日在英國英格蘭賀福爾布雷德沃迪享年54歲。

zh-hans.Bosbury,Hereford,England: 英国英格兰賀福爾波斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Watkins II于1600年1月1日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾波斯波利时，他的父亲Richard Watkins30岁，母亲Martha Peede33岁。他和Blanche至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1654年11月25日在英国英格兰賀福爾布雷德沃迪享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Watkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Watkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watkin
meanings: English and Welsh: from the personal name Watkin, a diminutive of Walter .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Watkins II was born on 1 January 1600, in Bosbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Watkins, was 30 and his mother, Martha Peede, was 33. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Blanche. He died on 25 November 1654, in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Watkins II est né le 1 janvier 1600, à Bosbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Watkins, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Martha Peede, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Blanche. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1654, à Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Watkins II am 1. Januar 1600 in Bosbury, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Watkins 30 und seine Mutter Martha Peede 33. Er hatte mit Blanche mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. November 1654 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Watkins II è nato il il 1 gennaio 1600 nel Bosbury, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Watkins, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Martha Peede, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Blanche. Morì il 25 novembre 1654, nel Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Watkins II(이)가 1600년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 보스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Watkins(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Peede(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Blanche(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1654년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브레드워딘에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 Jan 1600–25 Nov 1654: 1 de janeiro de 1600–25 de novembro de 1654
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Watkins II nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1600, em Bosbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Watkins, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Martha Peede, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Blanche. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1654, em Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Watkins II родился 1 января 1600 г. в местности босбури, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Watkins было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Peede, 33. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Blanche. Он умер 25 ноября 1654 г. в местности бредвардаин, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.1 Jan 1600–25 Nov 1654: 1 de enero de 1600–25 de noviembre de 1654
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Watkins II nació el 1 de enero de 1600, en Bosbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Watkins, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Martha Peede, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Blanche. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1654, en Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
